title: Sara and Eva — Ep 13: The Big Tag Game at the Playground!
logline: Family playground day with Daddy. Tag-monster game on the grass, Three Little Pigs role-play around the playground tower-house (Daddy is the silly Big Bad Wolf, kids are the giggly pigs who refuse to let him in), Daddy gets stuck in the tube slide trying to chase them. Scooter escape to the tennis court. Then Isabel (kindergarten) and her 3-year-old brother Leo arrive — 'Can we play?' — and a big group tag game with all 8 of them seals brand-new friendships. Cliffhanger camera-ask: did YOU make new friends today?
formulaReference: Bluey-style 'playground friendship-making + classic-tale role-play + Papa-active play' — high-retention combo. Three Little Pigs role-play (literacy bonus + repeatable refrain). Multi-location pivot (playground → scooters → tennis court). Friendship-arc payoff (Isabel + Leo introduced as recurring characters for future episodes — Bluey's Indy/Honey pattern).
durationTotal: ~7:56 (17 normal × 10s = 170s + 1 × 15s = 15s + A 120s + B 60s + C 60s + intro 31s + outro 20s)
expectedCreditsBreakdown: 17 normal clips × 90 cr = 1530 + 1 parent-activity 15s × 135 cr = 135 + 1 music-video 15s render (A) × 135 cr = 135 + 2 music-video 10s renders (B,C) × 90 cr = 180 → 1980 cr base; +25% buffer ≈ 2475 cr realistic ceiling. Right at the 2200 abort threshold — acceptable per ep10/ep12 precedent because the 3 music videos materially extend runtime + provide top-retention moments.
